nasb.text: Then she spoke to him with these words, “The Hebrew slave, whom you brought to us, came in to me to make sport of me;

esv.text: and she told him the same story, saying, “The Hebrew servant, whom you have brought among us, came in to me to laugh at me.

cnv.text: 她又用同樣的話對他說：“你帶回家來的希伯來奴隸，竟進到這裡來，要調戲我。

ccb.text: 就对他说：“你带回来的那个希伯来人进来要戏弄我，

csbs.text: 也用这些话对他说：“你带给我们的那个希伯来奴仆，到我这里来要戏弄我。
